text:
While I'm at it

commit 49d5458aaf458aaacf3250bc72cc90dc2a983497 (HEAD -> master, origin/master, origin/HEAD)
Author: Paul Floyd <pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr>
Date:   Wed Apr 24 21:34:03 2024 +0200

    FreeBSD syscall: add wrapper for kcmp
    
    For FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT. Will need to add for 14.1 when it is out.
    Mostly the same as the Linux kcmp syscall (small differences in the
    supported types).

Again it will be in Valgrind 3.23 in a couple of days.
